title: capsicum annuum var. frutescens
intro: Capsicum annuum var. frutescens, also known as the tabasco pepper or bird's eye chili, is a variety of the capsicum annuum plant that is native to the Americas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its capsaicin content. The health benefits of consuming capsicum annuum var. frutescens include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically to relieve muscle and joint pain.
